issues.title: Setup React TypeScript project structure
issues.description:
## Description
Initialize a React TypeScript project with Vite for the power distribution payment system frontend. Include proper folder structure for components, pages, services, and utilities.

## Proposed Changes
- Implement the feature or fix as described in: **Setup React TypeScript project structure**.
- Review the existing codebase for context and ensure the architecture remains consistent.
- Add necessary UI components, services, or utilities as required by the task.

## Files to Edit
You will likely need to edit or create the following files:
- `package.json`
- `tsconfig.json`
- `vite.config.ts`

## Commands to Run
You may need to run the following commands to set up dependencies or tools:
```bash
npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
npm install
npm install @types/react @types/react-dom
```
